caption:
I leaned back against the mahogany of the professor's desk, the cool wood contrasting with the warmth spreading through my cheeks. The lecture hall had emptied, leaving just the hum of the air conditioner and the rhythmic tapping of my pen against the notebook. My silk blouse hugged my chest, the fabric cool against my skin, the top button undone to reveal a teasing sliver of cleavage beneath the structured blazer. 

"You asked for the raw data" I murmured, my voice dropping an octave as I shifted, the fabric of my pencil skirt tightening around my thighs. He hovered near the door, his shadow stretching across the carpet, eyes tracing the silhouette of my figure. It was a dangerous game, this power dynamic, but we both knew who held the real leverage. The scent of my perfume, a mix of vanilla and sandalwood, filled the quiet room, wrapping around us like a silent invitation. I reached for the file, my fingers brushing against his, the spark of electricity undeniable. This was more than a late-night study session; it was a collision of intellect and instinct. 

#universityteacher #officehours #professorlife #campuscourtside #allure #sexyteacher
